taxonomy: Syndesmanthus fasciculatus is classified as a species of flowering plant in the family Apocynaceae. It is native to tropical Africa. This plant is also known as the 'clustered milkwort' due to its milky sap and clustered growth habit. As a member of the Apocynaceae family, Syndesmanthus fasciculatus is closely related to other plants in this family, including the dogbane and oleander.
